          Gentilini Wine Tasting
          Robola · Muscat · Minies, Kefalonia
          About Gentilini Winery

          To Gentilini Winery is one of the most celebrated wineries in Kefalonia, known for award-winning whites from the indigenous Robola grape. Founded in 1984 by Nick Cosmetatos, operating organically since 2005. Located in Minies, just 15 minutes from White Rocks.

          ⭐ 4.7/5 Google Organic since 2005 Award-winning Est. 1984
          Location & Hours
          Minies, Kefalonia (near Argostoli)
          Mon–Sat 10:00–18:00
          ~15 min from White Rocks
          +30 2671 069615
          www.gentilini.gr
          Main Wines
          Robola Classic
          White · Dry · Citrus, honey, minerals
          Gentilini Fume
          White · Dry · Robola oak-aged
          Eclectique Rose
          Rose · Dry · Mavrodaphne + Syrah
          Muscat
          White · Off-dry · Moschofilerο
          Tasting Experience
          3-wine tasting + vineyard tour
          ~EUR 12–15/person
          ~45–60 minutes
          Reservation recommended
          Tip: Ideal with Van Tour 2 or afternoon standalone
          Staff Tips for Guests
          Best time to visit
          Morning 10:00–13:00 for fewer crowds and cooler weather
          Combine with
          Agios Gerasimos Monastery (5 min) + Drogarati + Melissani
          Shop prices
          Robola Classic EUR 12–15 · Fume EUR 18–22
          GPS Directions
          "Gentilini Winery Kefalonia" · Lassi to Argostoli to Minies
